title: placeholder: various healthcheck race conditions under parallel bats
body:
My problem. There are a bunch of different ones, which I'll incrementally fix in #23275, but I need one issue for tracking.


* fedora-39 : sys podman fedora-39 root host boltdb
    * [08-15 13:42](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5574099160793088/html/sys-podman-fedora-39-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--00301p) in [sys] |700| podman kube play healthcheck should wait initialDelaySeconds before updating status (unhealthy)
* fedora-39 : sys remote fedora-39 root host boltdb [remote]
    * [08-15 08:47](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5416101843042304/html/sys-remote-fedora-39-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--00125p) in [sys] |220| podman healthcheck
* fedora-40 : sys podman fedora-40 root host boltdb
    * [09-04 16:34](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5876750574419968/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--00385p) in [sys] |700| podman kube play healthcheck should wait initialDelaySeconds before updating status (unhealthy)
* rawhide : sys remote rawhide root host sqlite [remote]
    * [08-19 17:15](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6202759932805120/html/sys-remote-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00127p) in [sys] |220| podman wait --condition={healthy,unhealthy}

| x | x | x | x | x | x |
| ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| sys(4) | remote(2) | fedora-39(2) | root(4) | host(4) | boltdb(3) |
|  | podman(2) | rawhide(1) |  |  | sqlite(1) |
|  |  | fedora-40(1) |  |  |  |

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
